items.description: Rename root CLAUDE.md to AGENTS.md.
Rename wiki/CLAUDE.md to wiki/AGENTS.md.
Rename apps/wake-word/CLAUDE.md to apps/wake-word/AGENTS.md.
Update active references from CLAUDE.md to AGENTS.md in docs, scripts, systemd Documentation links, tests, and comments.
Preserve nested AGENTS.md placement so Codex guidance stays scoped to root, wiki, and wake-word work.
Remove Claude compatibility manual files rather than leaving CLAUDE.md symlinks.
Replace .claude/settings.json with minimal Codex hook config in .codex/config.toml and/or .codex/hooks.json.
Enable Codex hooks with [features].codex_hooks = true.
Move hook scripts from .claude/hooks/ to .codex/hooks/.
Port the Bash protected-path hook to Codex PreToolUse for Bash.
Port the Edit/Write protected-path hook to Codex PreToolUse for apply_patch, using tool_input.command rather than Claude's tool_input.file_path.
Protect apps/tests/invariants/**.
Protect .githooks/**.
Protect web-ui/invariants/**.
Protect web-ui/src/api-client/generated/**.
Return permissionDecision: deny for protected writes.
Include a clear hook denial reason telling the agent to stop and ask the user for an explicit migration or human-owned-file exception.
Rename test comments and documentation in test_webui_invariants_wired.py from Claude-specific language to Codex or harness language.
Delete the .claude/settings.json assertion from test_webui_invariants_wired.py.
Keep the existing ESLint shim, TypeScript shim, and sentinel checks.
Do not add a replacement pytest that checks Codex hook configuration.
Move .claude/skills/unstuck to .agents/skills/unstuck.
Move .claude/skills/reference-builder to .agents/skills/reference-builder.
Remove .claude/skills/review-issue.
Remove .claude/skills/close-issue.
Remove .claude/skills/create-issue.
Remove .claude/skills/skill-creator unless there is a specific local reason to keep it instead of Codex's bundled skill creator.
Audit retained skills for Claude-only fields and assumptions.
Remove .codex/skills -> ../.agents/skills symlink.
Add only the project-level Codex config needed for shared hook behavior.
Do not port Claude permission allow/ask/deny lists.
Do not build Codex rules or sandbox profiles unless a concrete failure shows yolo mode plus hooks is insufficient.
Update docs that tell agents to use Claude-specific commands, permission modes, or approval flows.

tasks.title: Move worktrees and remove legacy plans

items.description: Move manual agent worktrees to .agents/worktrees.
Add .agents/worktrees/ to .gitignore.
Update scripts/worktree-port and active docs that still reference .claude/worktrees.
Remove docs/plans/ and anything in it as legacy Claude-era planning cruft.
Do not migrate old generator or orchestrator docs unless a currently active workflow still depends on them.

tasks.title: Keep runtime Claude integrations out of scope

items.description: Do not include runtime claude -p, claude-agent-sdk, Telegram bot, or Anthropic model migration in this epic.
Track runtime agent migration as a separate Codex/OpenAI epic if we decide to move those systems.
Leave the application MCP server under apps/mcp/ alone.
Do not add Codex MCP client config as part of this epic because we do not currently use MCP clients.

acceptance_criteria.description: No active checked-in operating manual is named CLAUDE.md; intended manuals are named AGENTS.md.
acceptance_criteria.verification: find excludes .git/.venv/node_modules/.agents/worktrees and finds no active CLAUDE.md files; AGENTS.md exists at repo root, wiki/, and apps/wake-word/.

acceptance_criteria.description: Root, wiki, and wake-word Codex guidance loads from the expected AGENTS.md files.
acceptance_criteria.verification: AGENTS.md files exist at repo root, wiki/AGENTS.md, and apps/wake-word/AGENTS.md.

acceptance_criteria.description: Active references in docs, scripts, systemd units, comments, and tests use AGENTS.md and Codex terminology where appropriate.
acceptance_criteria.verification: rg over active docs/scripts/systemd/tests/harness paths finds no stale CLAUDE.md/.claude/docs/plans references except runtime Claude integration under apps/voice, which is explicitly out of scope.

acceptance_criteria.description: .claude/ project harness config is removed after any still-useful hooks and skills are migrated.
acceptance_criteria.verification: find .claude reports no such directory after moving hooks/skills/worktrees and deleting legacy project harness config.

acceptance_criteria.description: .agents/skills contains the retained skills: simplify, unstuck, and reference-builder.
acceptance_criteria.verification: find .agents/skills -maxdepth 2 shows simplify, unstuck, and reference-builder.

acceptance_criteria.description: .agents/worktrees/ is gitignored and active worktree docs/scripts point there.
acceptance_criteria.verification: .gitignore contains .agents/worktrees/; scripts/worktree-port references .agents/worktrees; git worktree list --porcelain shows registered worktrees under .agents/worktrees.

acceptance_criteria.description: docs/plans/ is removed if no active workflow depends on it.
acceptance_criteria.verification: docs/plans/ removed; active docs/scripts/tests no longer reference docs/plans after excluding historical progress/reference snapshots.

acceptance_criteria.description: Codex hooks are enabled and block protected writes to the same paths the Claude hooks protected.
acceptance_criteria.verification: python3 tomllib parse of .codex/config.toml passes; .codex/hooks/protect-invariants-*.sh return permissionDecision deny for protected writes.

acceptance_criteria.description: Hook behavior is tested directly for Bash and apply_patch protected-write attempts.
acceptance_criteria.verification: bash .codex/hooks/test-protect-invariants.sh: 17 passed, 0 failed, covering Bash and apply_patch protected-write attempts.

acceptance_criteria.description: The .claude/settings.json assertion is removed from test_webui_invariants_wired.py; no replacement pytest checks Codex hook wiring.
acceptance_criteria.verification: uv run pytest apps/tests/invariants/test_webui_invariants_wired.py -q: 5 passed; the .claude/settings.json assertion was removed and no replacement pytest checks Codex hook wiring.

acceptance_criteria.description: Existing test and lint workflows still pass after the migration.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Verified locally: bash .codex/hooks/test-protect-invariants.sh passed 17/17; uv run ruff check passed; uv run pytest apps/tests/invariants/ -q passed 105, 1 skipped; uv run pytest -q passed 464, 1 skipped; pnpm --dir web-ui lint/typecheck/test passed; uv run scripts/lint.py exits 0 with one accepted File length warning.

open_questions.question: For protected writes, is hard deny plus a human exception workflow acceptable, given Codex PreToolUse does not currently support ask?
open_questions.resolution: Resolved for this migration by implementing hard-deny Codex PreToolUse hooks with explicit stop-and-ask denial reasons; no ask/allow PreToolUse behavior is used.
